subcodes.first_line: O steadfast leaf, who hath witnessed calamity, verily at the age of fourteen thou hast rent hearts asunder [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه صابره مصیبت نوردیده چهارده ساله فی الحقیقه جگرها را پاره پاره نموده
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @theodicy; the mystery of evil; of suffering, @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
